title: Mid-block speed sprint
text: we are the best and we know it now is the time to shine and show the world we can do this together as one

character_tips.anna: Pure speed test. No tricks — just words at top tempo.
character_tips.maxim: Sprint training. Don't slow for any reason.
character_tips.knopych: ⚡ SPEED MODE! No brakes! GO GO GO!
character_tips.klavochka: Like racing, my star — fast but light 🌟
